name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem or motivation

<!-- What problem does this solve? Who benefits and how? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Describe what you want to happen. Be as specific as you can. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches you thought about, and why you ruled them out. -->

## Affected area

<!-- Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] Web app (quiz, proof pages, dashboard)
- [ ] API routes (`src/app/api/`)
- [ ] LLM pipeline (`src/lib/llm.ts`)
- [ ] GitHub integration (`src/lib/github.ts`)
- [ ] CLI (`cli/`)
- [ ] MCP server (`mcp/`)
- [ ] Database / schema
- [ ] Auth / security
- [ ] Documentation

## Additional context

<!-- Mockups, related issues, prior art, or any other relevant details. -->
